race.comment: TRIEDTOTELLYA (11) is taking on a far easier race this time after finishing seventh in a Group One at his latest appearance over 2936m at Gloucester Park, beaten 10 metres by Magnificent Storm. Top-shelf performer who is perfectly placed to bounce back. SHES ALLABOUTLUV NZ (4) broke in the run but recovered to make it four wins in succession last start when she scored by 5 metres over 1680m at this track. GORDONS BAY (9) is looming as a real threat after a better effort last start, finishing second at Hobart over 1609m. THE SHALLOWS (12) cannot be ruled out but needs a bit of luck from the tricky draw.
